description:
Given a User has selected a Favorite Team and saved that choice by clicking ‘Done’ in the Fav Team modal

* through the Getting Started workflow
* and/or through the Settings → Favorite Team workflow

steps.action: WHEN a user has selected a Favorite Team and navigates to the Home, Games or Settings page
steps.result: Then user should see their favorite team’s logo/avatar in the upper right hand corner of the page - in line with nav buttons
